articles.title: HOW TO MAX OUT YOUR OMNICHANNEL WINS WITH MAIL
articles.summary: With a 70% higher recall rate than digital ads, direct mail is a must-have in your omnichannel mix. The ebook _A MARKETER'S RECIPE FOR OMNICHANNEL SUCCESS_ [4] is full of ways to use mail to amplify your digital outreach.

articles.title: WHY THE BEST MARKETING TODAY IS BUILT TO BE FORWARDED
articles.summary: Content today is built around a simple design question: what would make someone want to share this with their network? Emotional specificity drives performance, with high arousal content generating 34% more shares than passive content. Discovery is also shifting, with nearly 1 in 3 consumers now starting searches on TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube instead of Google, rising to over 50% for Gen Z. Content that delivers a single clear insight and fits shrinking attention spans is more likely to circulate than sit idle.

articles.title: THE APP STORE IS BOOMING AGAIN, AND AI MAY BE WHY
HOW TO OPTIMIZE YOUR PRICING PAGE FOR AGENTS
articles.summary: SaaS companies are optimizing pricing pages for AI agents as well as humans. Buffer added a machine-readable /pricing.md file that structures pricing and packaging in markdown. This allows AI tools to parse pricing directly instead of scraping pages or relying on outdated data. It builds on the llms.txt movement and treats pricing as structured data. The approach enables fast comparison across tools and reduces ambiguity in pricing pages.

articles.title: WHY I BUILT MY BUSINESS ON BEEHIIV
articles.summary: StrategyBreakdowns.com was built on beehiiv using 3 core tactics. First, design a unique brand using full control over email and website design, custom code, and a native site builder. Second, use segmented onboarding with lead magnets and automated email sequences that adapt to reader intent. Third, grow and monetize through cross newsletter recommendations, paid Boosts, and analytics that optimize acquisition and sponsorship performance in one system.

articles.title: 🧠 WANT TO WIN THE AI CUSTOMER JOURNEY? START WITH HOW AI WORKS.
articles.summary: Most AEO advice skips the part where you understand what you're optimizing for. Join Evertune's FREE WEBINAR [9] on April 30 to learn how LLMs are trained, why they respond the way they do, and what that means for your brand's AI visibility. 30 minutes. No fluff. SAVE YOUR

articles.title: THE NEW PLAYBOOK: HOW REDDIT ADS WIN IN THE AI SEARCH ERA (WEBINAR)
articles.summary: This event, on April 24, will explain how Reddit ads are evolving in the AI search era and how they influence both direct conversions and long term visibility. It focuses on how Reddit ad formats drive bottom of funnel performance while also shaping what AI systems surface about brands during the buyer journey. The session introduces the Reddit Ads Flywheel, where ad spend not only converts current buyers but also builds ongoing reputation and visibility over time.

articles.title: LINKEDIN'S ALGORITHM KILLED COMPANY PAGES. EMPLOYEES ARE THE DISTRIBUTION NOW
articles.summary: LinkedIn has shifted distribution from company pages to employees, making personal profiles the main driver of B2B reach. Its 360Brew algorithm prioritizes semantic signals of expertise over engagement, favoring content that shows real professional insight. Only about 3% of employees post, but they generate roughly 30% of brand engagement. This aligns with buyer behavior, where 64% of hidden decision makers prefer thought leadership content over marketing materials, and with LinkedIn becoming a major source for AI search systems.

articles.title: HOW TO TRANSITION FROM LINK BUILDING TO DIGITAL PR
articles.summary: A top ranking page can have hundreds of links but only a few high quality ones. Strong campaigns often send 20-50% fewer pitches while still earning 3-10 pieces of coverage. It relies on targeted outreach, clear story driven pitches, and timely ideas tied to news or trends, since journalists prioritize relevance over link requests. Results typically appear within 3-6 months, with faster impact from high authority coverage and improved indexing. Pricing is shifting toward retainers and data driven work. Metrics should expand beyond backlinks to include nofollow links and mentions, as about 75% of clients now value AI visibility.

articles.title: THE CONTENT CULTURES THAT LAST HAVE ONE THING IN COMMON
articles.summary: Most content programs stall around the 18-month mark. 22% of B2B marketers rate their content marketing as very or extremely successful, while 42% cite a lack of clear goals as the root cause of underperformance. The difference between programs that fade and those that endure comes down to culture, built on a documented editorial mission, cross-functional ownership across product and sales teams, and sustainable workflows that prevent burnout.

articles.title: GOOGLE'S PATENT LITERALLY TELLS YOU HOW TO REFRESH YOUR CONTENT
articles.summary: Meaningful refreshes include updating the page title, adding a new substantive section, or changing link attributes.

articles.title: STOP SKIPPING THESE 5 MARKETING BASICS
articles.summary: Focus on one customer, stay consistent, fix funnel bottlenecks, and repeat core actions fast.
